compliance.assurance_rationale: ASD Essential Eight E8.06 Patch operating systems — Windows update compliance tracking is the definitive OS-patching evidence for E8 maturity assessment.
APRA CPS 234 15 Policy framework — patch-compliance reporting supports the information-security policy evidence expected under APRA paragraph 15.
NERC CIP-010-4 R1 Configuration change management — Windows update compliance evidences the security-patch portion of configuration change management for BES Cyber Systems.
